data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a room scan (360 camera view) but did not provide any concrete evidence or checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for a room scan, but there are no API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented or verified. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided regarding the room scan requirement.
gaps: No evidence of room scan (360 camera view) functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for room scan functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the room scan requirement is implemented and can be validated through API responses.
